message:
Analyze this email and determine if it contains information about a financial investment (like FD, PPF, Mutual Fund, Stocks, Bonds, etc.).

Email Subject: 7 profile views
Email Content: 7 profile viewers Viewers you might be interested in 2 work at Programming.com 1 work at ZONK STUDIOS 1 work at Dream Game Studios 1 work at TO THE NEW 1 work at CitiusTech 3 found you through LinkedIn Profile 1 works at a company with open roles you may be interested in 1 has a connection who may be hiring for roles that match your job function https://www.linkedin.com/comm/me/profile-views?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_b2_professional_identity_digest_02%3BmPOU3vL4Q9eFhtLK4MqT4g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFMjYnuODQXdg&midSig=3NOdtOvfotFY41&trk=eml-b2_professional_identity_digest_02-email~professional~identity~digest-0-profile~views&trkEmail=eml-b2_professional_identity_digest_02-email~professional~identity~digest-0-profile~views-null-10ivnq~mk992zi3~8o-null-null&eid=10ivnq-mk992zi3-8o&otpToken=MTQwNDFkZTQxNTJlYzhjMGJlMmYwMmVjNGUxZmU3YjI4OGNlZDg0Nzk4YTk4NTZkNzljNjAxNjY0ZTVmNWJmNWZjYmY5NGU2NDhmN2Q4ZDA2NTNiZTc0MjUxZDRkMDVjYmNiMTM4OWRjNDdiNjRmNGRlLDEsMQ%3D%3D

Return ONLY a JSON object with:
{
  "isInvestmentEmail": true or false,
  "confidence": number between 0 and 1
}
systemPrompt: You are a financial email analyzer. Analyze emails and determine if they contain investment information. Return ONLY valid JSON with "isInvestmentEmail" (boolean) and "confidence" (number 0-1) fields.
